ab: Hmuwa su mesa musa behing?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: Mgeriq ku rulu musa behing.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: Hmuwa mesa musa sapah ising ka heya?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: Mkkesa musa sapah ising ka heya.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: Huwa su mesa musa Ponghu ka isu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Taapa ku sapah skiya musa Ponghu ka yaku.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: Hmuwa su mesa musa Ponghu ka isu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Taapa ku asu musa Ponghu ka yaku.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: Taapa su maanu musa sapah ka isu?
en: How do you go home?

ab: Taapa ku ceyun musa sapah ka yaku.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: Taapa maanu musa sapah pyasan ka Padiq?
en: How does Padiq go to school?

ab: Taapa rulu puniq musa sapah pyasan ka Padiq.
en: Padiq goes to school by train.

ab: Taapa maanu musa sapah thmkuwan ka Temu?
en: How does Basaw go to church?

ab: Taapa rulu tmediq musa sapah thmkuwan ka Temu.
en: Temu goes to church by bicycle.

ab: Taapa su ceyun musa sapah pyasan ka isu?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: Uxe, taapa ku basu musa sapah pyasan ka yaku.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: Taapa su rulu tmediq musa sapah pyasan ka isu?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: Un, taapa ku rulu tmediq musa sapah pyasan ka yaku.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: Taapa su kawte musa Kawsiyong ka isu?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: Un, taapa ku Kawte musa Kawsiyong ka yaku.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: Musa su Taytong ye su taapa rulu puniq? Ye su taapa sapah skiya?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: Taapa ku sapah skiya. Ini beyo dhekan ka tpaan sapah skiya daka tpaan rulu puniq.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: Musa su sapah thmkuwan, ye su taapa basu? Ye su mgeriq naq rulu?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: Mgeriq ku rulu musa sapah thmkuwan. Ini beyo ka mgeriq naq rulu daka taapa basu.
ch: B:我開車去教會，自己開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: Ye msdaling sapah su daha ka sebunrebun?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: Mstheya! Asi ku ka taapa otobay musa.
ch: B:有距離，我必須騎摩托車去。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: Ye msdaling pdesan patis daha ka sapah pyasan?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: Msdaling, dhekan ka mkkesa.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: Ye msdaling sapah ppuqan daha ka tpaan rulu?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: Kndalax tpaan rulu, mkkesa rima taktak de dhekan da.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
